summary: Classified the 10 hydrated open PRs as live inventory items. Nine PRs are independent non-security inventory items. #79185 is routed to central OpenClaw security handling after deterministic validation flagged it as security-sensitive; no close/fix/merge actions were planned because the job disables low-signal closeout, fix PRs, and merge.

actions.reason: Focused open bug-fix PR with proof/check signal, not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate in this shard.
Independent focused bug-fix PR, but proof/check failures block any merge/fixed-by-candidate treatment and no close/fix action is allowed.
Independent follow-up bug-fix PR with failing proof; keep open for maintainer/proof path.
Broad independent feature PR, not a low-signal or duplicate close candidate; check-docs failure and product/technical scope require normal maintainer review.
Independent focused fix linked to an open issue; proof failure blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate treatment and no close/fix action is enabled.
Independent focused PR with linked issue and failing relevant checks; keep open for technical correctness and maintainer review.
Independent focused contributor PR, not closable or mergeable in this job because merge/fix actions are disabled and maintainer/final review remains required.
Independent focused test PR with active proof/check signal; not a low-signal close candidate.
Independent PR with failing proof/checks and broader implementation surface; keep open rather than close or treat as candidate fix.
Security-sensitive auth/token handling must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security triage for the exact PR ref.
